items.title: MrTiz/CET-Enum-CallStack-Spoofer — A Proof of Concept demonstrating CET-compliant callstack spoofing in Rust. It leverages Windows Thread Pool and Enum Callback trampolining (e.g., EnumSystemLocalesEx) to forge a pristine, hardware-aligned call stack for indirect syscall evasion.
